name: [GRV-API] Celery Task Performance Monitor
message:
Celery task performance degradation detected.

Task: {{celery.task_name}}
P95 Duration: {{trace.celery.task.duration.p95}}ms
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Task Performance Impact:
- Long-running tasks affecting queue throughput
- Potential resource contention or inefficient processing
- May cause task timeouts and failures

Investigation Steps:
1. Check task performance: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources/{{celery.task_name}}?env=prod
2. Review task code for optimization opportunities
3. Check database queries within the task
4. Analyze external API call performance
5. Consider task splitting or optimization

Celery Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources?env=prod&resource=celery

options.escalation_message: Celery task performance continues to degrade. Background job processing severely impacted.
